steps.t: The back entrance can be found downhill from the panicked Rohirrim woman, towards the water. The panicked Rohirrim woman recommended entering the lumb…
The lumber-yard lies along the road to Fenmarch, north-east of Aldburg. The panicked Rohirrim woman told you to seek out Guthláf within the lumber-yar…
Guthláf is in the lumber-yard, north-east of Aldburg. You should speak with Guthláf about how to reclaim the lumber-yard.
Guthláf awaits you north of the orchard. The Orc-lieutenant has been defeated and the orchard is safe. You should return to Guthláf and report the goo…
